ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of class (e.g., Mage, Warrior, Scout) */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the character */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the character (e.g., Human, Elf, Dwarf) */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Moral alignment of the character (e.g., Good, Neutral, Evil) */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Current experience points of the character */,
  "next_level_points" INTEGER /* Experience points required for the next level */,
  "health_points" INTEGER /* Current health points of the character */,
  "max_health_points" INTEGER /* Maximum health points of the character */,
  "mana_points" INTEGER /* Current mana points of the character */,
  "max_mana_points" INTEGER /* Maximum mana points of the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the character was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the character was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of attributes */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character this set of attributes belongs to */,
  "arcane" INTEGER /* Arcane magic skill level */,
  "blade" INTEGER /* Blade skill level */,
  "cold" INTEGER /* Resistance to cold damage */,
  "fire" INTEGER /* Resistance to fire damage */,
  "impact" INTEGER /* Impact damage capability */,
  "pierce" INTEGER /* Piercing damage capability */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Physical strength of the character */,
  "dexterity" INTEGER /* Agility and reflexes of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Mental acuity of the character */,
  "charisma" INTEGER /* Social and persuasive abilities of the character */,
  "constitution" INTEGER /* Endurance and resilience of the character */,
  "wisdom" INTEGER /* Insight and perception of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "skill_level" INTEGER /* Level of the skill */,
  "skill_cooldown" INTEGER /* Cooldown period for the skill in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character this inventory belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item (e.g., Weapon, Armor, Potion) */,
  "item_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the item */,
  "equipped" INTEGER /* Whether the item is currently equipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_inventory_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_log" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle log entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character involved in the battle */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the battle (e.g., Win, Lose) */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* Date when the battle took place */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt by the character */,
  "damage_taken" INTEGER /* Total damage taken by the character */,
  "healing_done" INTEGER /* Total healing done by the character */,
  "healing_received" INTEGER /* Total healing received by the character */,
  "experience_gained" INTEGER /* Experience points gained from the battle */,
  "items_looted" TEXT /* Items looted from the battle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_log_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "quest_name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the quest */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for completing the quest */,
  "quest_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the quest */,
  "quest_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the quest */,
  "quest_rewards" TEXT /* Rewards for completing the quest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the quest was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the quest was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_quests" (
  "character_quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character's quest entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quest */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the quest (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the quest was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_quests_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_quests_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
